name: Oat-Wheat Bagel Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine yeast, gluten, oat flour, whole wheat flour, cinnamon, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Mix honey into the water until dissolved.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until a dough forms.
4. Knead the dough on a floured surface until smooth (approximately 10 minutes).
5. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise for 1 hour or until doubled in size.
6. Punch down the dough and shape it into a loaf.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and hollow to the touch.
8. Variations: Add one-third cup grated or chopped carrots, millet, and/or sunflower seeds.
